_meta.title: event-header — minimal fixture
_meta.fixture_purpose: Exercises event-header in isolation with literal-prop overrides (the CLI harness has no WP, so live postmeta reads fall back to props). Covers: (1) ungated virtual event → join link; (2) gated virtual event (looth-pro) under the anonymous test viewer → gate card; (3) in-person event with no zoom_url → no CTA; (4) variant + escaping.
